content:
✨ savr | HTML
🎯 Primary Use Case: Saving and reading online content offline, with a focus on user data control and decentralization.
✨ Key Features: • Save articles for reading later • Remove distractions like advertisements • Read content and images without an internet connection • No dependency on a service/company for scraping or storage • Optional authorization and cross-device synchronization (Dropbox/Google Drive)
📖 Summary: Savr is a progressive web app designed for saving online content like articles and images for offline reading. It prioritizes user data ownership, decentralization, and works locally without requiring a server or company dependency.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
